# Chapter-5: ITKD Language Manual

## Purpose

- target-specific materialization of IPC-L semantics.

## Targets

- `dest/C.itkd`
- `dest/Python.itkd`
- `dest/Ruby.itkd`

## Mapping Layers

- semantic node to target representation;
- runtime helper mapping;
- template emission ordering.

## Constraints

- deterministic symbol naming.
- full coverage for all emitted semantic constructs.
- explicit failures when mapping gaps exist.
